notification: New Client from Bryle James Gabunada - Auto-processed

analysis.summary: I recently purchased Lot 22 and still have not received my owner portal login details.
recommended_actions: Verify the ownership transfer in the system against the lot conveyancing documents
Create a new portal account for the owner
Send a welcome email with login credentials, a guide to the portal features, and a copy of the current levy schedule and by-laws

historical_reference.previous_resolution: account created and welcome email sent same day

analysis.suggested_response: Hi Bryle James Gabunada, congratulations on your new property! Welcome to the building. It looks like your portal account hasn't been set up yet — this sometimes happens when the conveyancing settlement details haven't come through to us. I'll create your account today and send your login credentials along with a welcome pack to this email address. You should receive it within a few hours.

client_info.inquiry_message: I recently purchased Lot 22 and still have not received my owner portal login details.

similar_cases.summary: New owner cannot log in to the owner portal after purchasing a lot, credentials not received
similar_cases.original_message: I recently purchased Lot 22 at 55 Park Avenue. I was told I'd get login details for the online portal but I haven't received anything. Can you help?
similar_cases.recommended_action: Verify the ownership transfer in the system against the lot conveyancing documents. Create a new portal account for the owner. Send a welcome email with login credentials, a guide to the portal features, and a copy of the current levy schedule and by-laws. Complete within 1 business day.
similar_cases.suggested_response: Congratulations on your new property! Welcome to the building. It looks like your portal account hasn't been set up yet — this sometimes happens when the conveyancing settlement details haven't come through to us. I'll create your account today and send your login credentials along with a welcome pack to this email address. You should receive it within a few hours.
similar_cases.previous_resolution: account created and welcome email sent same day

similar_cases.summary: Lot owner asking why their quarterly levy increased by 20% without prior notice
similar_cases.original_message: I just received my levy notice and it's gone up by $180 compared to last quarter. Nobody told me about this. Can you explain?
similar_cases.recommended_action: Pull the levy schedule and AGM minutes for the current financial year. Confirm whether a special levy or budget increase was passed. Send the owner a copy of the relevant AGM resolution and updated levy schedule. If the increase was not properly approved, escalate to the strata committee immediately.
similar_cases.suggested_response: Thank you for getting in touch. I can see your levy notice has changed from the previous quarter. This increase was approved at the Annual General Meeting held on [DATE] — I will email you a copy of the relevant resolution and the updated levy schedule within one business day. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have further questions.

similar_cases.summary: Owner in Lot 14 reporting persistent late-night noise from upstairs neighbour, ongoing for 3 weeks
similar_cases.original_message: Hi, I've been getting noise complaints from the unit above me every night after 10pm. This has been going on for 3 weeks and nothing has been done. My lot is 14 at 22 Harbour Street.
similar_cases.recommended_action: Issue formal noise by-law breach notice to Lot 15 (the unit directly above Lot 14 at 22 Harbour St). Log the complaint in the dispute register. Follow up with both parties within 48 hours. If repeated, escalate to NCAT mediation referral.
similar_cases.suggested_response: Dear Maria, thank you for raising this concern. We take noise complaints very seriously and have logged your report against Lot 15. We will issue a formal notice to the owner today and follow up with you within 48 hours to confirm the outcome. Please continue to document any further incidents with dates and times.
similar_cases.previous_resolution: by-law notice issued, resolved within 7 days

notification: HIGH PRIORITY: New Client from Bryle James Gabunada

recommended_actions: Dispatch emergency plumber immediately (use preferred contractor list — 24hr contact: Rapid Plumbing 0412 555 890)
Isolate water supply to affected riser if safe to do so
Document with photos before repairs begin

historical_reference.previous_resolution: plumber on-site in 45 mins, pipe joint replaced

analysis.suggested_response: Hi Bryle James Gabunada, thank you for alerting us immediately. We are treating this as an emergency and have dispatched our contracted plumber who will be on-site within the hour. Please avoid the area near the leak and ensure no electrical appliances are near the water. We will keep you updated.

similar_cases.summary: Water leaking from ceiling in common corridor, Level 3, possible pipe burst
similar_cases.original_message: There is water dripping from the ceiling on Level 3 near the lift. It started an hour ago and is getting worse. Can someone come urgently?
similar_cases.recommended_action: Dispatch emergency plumber immediately (use preferred contractor list — 24hr contact: Rapid Plumbing 0412 555 890). Notify building manager on-site. Isolate water supply to affected riser if safe to do so. Document with photos before repairs begin. Notify all affected lot owners within 2 hours.
similar_cases.suggested_response: Thank you for alerting us immediately. We are treating this as an emergency and have dispatched our contracted plumber who will be on-site within the hour. Please avoid the area near the leak and ensure no electrical appliances are near the water. We will keep you updated.
similar_cases.previous_resolution: plumber on-site in 45 mins, pipe joint replaced

similar_cases.summary: Building lift has been out of service for 2 days, elderly and disabled residents unable to access upper floors
similar_cases.original_message: The lift has been broken for 2 days now. We have elderly residents on the upper floors who cannot use the stairs. This is a serious safety issue.
similar_cases.recommended_action: Treat as a safety emergency. Contact lift maintenance contractor immediately for emergency repair (not a scheduled visit). Check if any residents are currently stranded and arrange temporary welfare checks. Notify all owners and tenants of the outage and estimated repair time. Document incident for insurance. If repair > 24h, arrange temporary mobility assistance for vulnerable residents.
similar_cases.suggested_response: We are treating this as an urgent safety matter. Our lift maintenance contractor has been contacted for emergency attendance today. In the meantime, please let us know if any residents require immediate welfare assistance so we can coordinate support. We will send a building-wide update within the hour and keep you informed of the repair timeline.
similar_cases.previous_resolution: emergency repair completed within 6 hours, welfare checks done
